title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Nykaa Retail

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Nykaa Retail
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Nykaa Retail in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nykaa Retail:
Nykaa Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nykaa Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
